espresso.headline: Anthropic releases Claude 4 with 200K context window
espresso.body: Anthropic has released Claude 4, significantly outperforming previous models on coding and reasoning benchmarks. The model supports a 200K token context window and is available via API immediately. Early adopters are already shipping production agents built on top of it.

cold_brew.title: React Server Components — the mental model that actually clicks
cold_brew.summary: React Server Components move data fetching to the server, eliminating the client-side waterfall problem entirely. Unlike SSR, RSCs never ship JavaScript to the browser, making them a fundamentally new primitive rather than an optimisation of existing patterns.
takeaways: Server components run only on the server — zero JS sent to the browser
They can directly access databases without an API layer in between
Client and server components can be mixed in the same component tree

pastry.title: shadcn/ui — copy-paste components with zero lock-in
pastry.why_it_matters: Unlike traditional component libraries, shadcn/ui gives you the actual source code — you own it completely. Built on Tailwind and Radix primitives, it has become the default choice for modern Next.js projects.
